name: No witnesses to my daily noise exposure, can I still win comp?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my daily noise exposure, can I still win comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, medical evidence and job records suffice; personal accounts common.[5] Key factors: Noise surveys, equipment specs, duration prove exposure.[2] Audiologist + expert opinion key.[1] Reconstruct via coworkers later, lawyer subpoenas employer data.[5] Don't delay filing.[2]
